description: Odoo 13 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.6+, QWeb + jQuery, @api.multi era. Reuses odoo-12 rules/memory (similar architecture); fork the preset to add v13-specific differences.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.
